REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT MYOUNG LEE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE, IF PLAINTIFF IS ABLE TO DO SO, ANY BASIS FOR RECOVERY AGAINST MS. LEE OTHER THAN COMMUNITY PROPERTY. CONTRARY TO PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATION ON COMPLAINT, MR. LEE'S PETITION DOES NOT ESTABLISH "THAT THERE WERE ASSETS THAT WERE NOT DISCLOSED AND THEREFORE NEVER DIVIDED. JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS, SEPTEMBER 8, 200 JUDGMENT AND JULY 27, 2016 ORDER, ESTABLISH THAT MARRIAGE (AND COMMUNITY) WAS DISSOLVED PRIOR TO THE DEBT BEING INCURRED BY MR. LEE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to mmm-dd-yyyy at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Dec-05-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Lee, 213-236-3536 for Defendant/Moving party Myoung Lee.
No other appearance.

Discussed. Mr. Lee did not comply with the tentative ruling and cannot argue. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MYOUNG LEE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is
SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege, if Plaintiff is able to do so, any basis for recovery against Ms. Lee other than community property. Contrary to Plaintiff's allegation on complaint, Mr. Lee's petition does not establish "that there were assets that were not disclosed and therefore never divided. Judicially noticeable documents, September 8, 200 Judgment and July 27, 2016 Order, establish that marriage (and community) was dissolved prior to the debt being incurred by Mr. Lee. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Continued To Sep-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MYOUNG LEE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The demurrer will be heard on September 12, 2018 at 9:30am in Dept. 501, the real property/housing court. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2018 Continued To Aug-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT MYOUNG LEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to August 16, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 per stipulation of the parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (L&M302)
